questions: Why do some media plans fail because they’re too big?
What does Nielsen recommend to avoid over‑scaled plans?
qa.answer: Overly large plans can drive diminishing returns, frequency waste, and audience oversaturation. Right‑sizing with optimal reach/frequency and balanced channel mix improves ROI.
implication: Analyze marginal returns; cap excessive frequency and overlap.
Shift budget from saturated to incremental reach channels.
Use experiments and MMM to find efficient scale points.
